content.text:
Based on my analysis of the molecule from multiple angles, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 1 (C:1).

## Results

**geomconf_index:** 7306

**Atom 1 Element:** C (Carbon)

**Neighbor atoms of C:1:**
| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 0 | C (Carbon) |
| 2 | O (Oxygen) |
| 3 | C (Carbon) |

**Summary:** Atom C:1 has three covalently bonded neighbors: carbon atom at index 0 (which has two hydrogen atoms attached: H:30 and H:31), oxygen atom at index 2, and carbon atom at index 3 (which connects to the rest of the ring structure). This forms a tetrahedral geometry typical of sp³ hybridized carbon.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 1, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
